name: Wire Standard Validation
description: On-wire ARP, ICMP, UDP, payload integrity, frame-size, VLAN, and PCP validation.

txProfile.name: ARP Request
txProfile.description: Broadcast ARP request for L2 path validation.

txProfile.name: ICMP Echo
txProfile.description: ICMP Echo Request for basic IPv4 reachability.

txProfile.name: UDP Unicast Basic
txProfile.description: Basic UDP payload for PC-FPGA-PC functional validation.

txProfile.name: UDP Sequence
txProfile.description: Sequence payload for loss, duplicate, and ordering checks.

txProfile.name: Payload Pattern AA55
txProfile.description: Alternating AA55 pattern for data-path integrity checks.

payload.data: aa 55 aa 55 aa 55 aa 55 aa 55 aa 55 aa 55 aa 55

txProfile.name: Payload Counter 256
txProfile.description: 0x00..0xff counter pattern for byte-order and truncation checks.

txProfile.name: Frame Size 64
txProfile.description: Minimum Ethernet frame size, excluding FCS.

txProfile.name: Frame Size 1514
txProfile.description: Standard untagged max frame length excluding FCS, equivalent to 1518 bytes on wire with FCS.

txProfile.name: VLAN 10 PCP 0
txProfile.description: 802.1Q tagged UDP frame with VID 10 and best-effort PCP 0.

txProfile.name: VLAN 10 PCP 7
txProfile.description: PCP 7 traffic candidate for later TAS scheduled traffic checks.

txProfile.name: VLAN 20 Isolation
txProfile.description: VID 20 traffic for VLAN isolation and filtering checks.
